text: The property is improved with a single-story, multi-tenant commercial office building that was constructed circa 1980. The building contains approximately 9,724 square feet of gross and rentable area and is finished and configured to accommodate multiple tenants. Three suites are present: a medical office, a salon, and one office suite that is currently vacant. The building layout provides flexibility for various professional and service-oriented tenants. The vacant office suite is finished for general office use and appears readily leasable. Overall, the building is functional for its intended use, exhibits typical architectural and structural characteristics for office buildings of this age and class, and shows no observed adverse conditions that would impact its continued use or marketability.
